description: Unified MCP server — auto-detects Gemini, Codex, Ollama, Antigravity; registers available tools
name: io.github.Lykhoyda/ask-llm

environmentVariables.description: Timeout for Antigravity (agy) execution in milliseconds (default: 300000 = 5 minutes)
environmentVariables.name: ASK_ANTIGRAVITY_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Set to '0' to drop agy's --sandbox flag if it blocks --add-dir context reads (default: sandbox on)
environmentVariables.name: ASK_ANTIGRAVITY_SANDBOX

environmentVariables.description: Timeout for CLI execution in milliseconds (default: 300000 = 5 minutes)
environmentVariables.name: GMCPT_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error (default: warn)
environmentVariables.name: GMCPT_LOG_LEVEL
